title: rubus erinicus
intro: Rubus erinicus, also known as the Indian raspberry or May bush, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Rubus erinicus include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, among others. Rubus erinicus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in the form of capsules and powder for its medicinal and health benefits.
